title: tracewall Agent Action Event
description: One hash-chained record of a single agent action (intent or effect).

run_id.description: The run this event belongs to.

event_type.description: Dotted action/lifecycle type, e.g. command_started, mcp.tool.call.started, os.file.denied, process.exec, policy.decision.

payload.description: Event-type-specific body; secrets are redacted before write.

prev_event_hash.description: event_hash of the previous event in the run, or null for the first.

event_hash.description: sha256 over the canonical event minus this field; links the chain.
